channel.title: Padel Coaching Tech Research
channel.description: Independent, evidence-graded research on padel coaching technology — competitor landscape, subscription economics, MVP design, and operating plan. Every claim cites a verifiable source URL.

item.title: Padel AI Coaching Platform — Strategic Brief
item.description: The full strategic brief: market sizing, jobs to be done, competitive landscape, defensibility analysis, go-to-market thinking, risk register, and pivot triggers. Eighteen sections, every numeric claim cited.

item.title: Evidence Map — Source Trace
item.description: Source trace for the strategic brief. Every claim cross-referenced to the verbatim source quote and the URL fetched at runtime.

item.title: Methodology — How This Research Was Built
item.description: The pipeline that produced the research: multi-agent orchestration, multi-model fan-out, evidence gates, mobile-first rendering, adversarial review.

item.title: Padel Coaching Tech: Competitor Landscape
item.description: Independent analysis of padel coaching apps, club-management software, and racket-sport AI. Who has data moats, where the white space is, what failed and why.

item.title: Padel App Subscription Economics: Pricing, Churn, LTV/CAC
item.description: How a padel coaching subscription would price against eight verified anchors, with monthly churn, LTV/CAC by channel, and four geographic scenarios.

item.title: Padel AI MVP Design: Capture, Insight, Practice Loop
item.description: Visual-first MVP design: a three-stage product loop, three pilot tracks compared, a decision tree, and a five-row risk register. Plain language, no jargon.

item.title: Padel AI Platform: First 90 Days Operating Plan
item.description: Twelve testable hypotheses, a metric tree from headline number to weekly leading indicators, and a risk register with named exit criteria.

item.title: Model Provenance: Every AI Model Used
item.description: Full disclosure of every model invoked across the pipeline, the role each played, and the billing class.
